en: Benjamin fathered Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, Aharah the third,
zh: 便雅憫生了長子比拉、次子亞實別、三子亞哈拉、

en: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
zh: 四子挪哈和五子拉法。

en: And Bela had sons: Addar, Gera, Abihud,
zh: 比拉的兒子是亞大、基拉、亞比忽、

en: Abishua, Naaman, Ahoah,
zh: 亞比書、乃幔、亞何亞、

en: Gera, Shephu-phan, and Huram.
zh: 基拉、示孚汛、戶蘭。

en: These are the sons of Ehud (they were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried into exile to Manahath):
zh: 以下這些人是以忽的子孫，他們是迦巴居民各家族的首領，曾被擄到瑪拿轄。

en: Naaman, Ahijah, and Gera, that is, Heglam, who fathered Uzza and Ahihud.
zh: 以忽的兒子是乃幔、亞希亞和基拉；基拉使他們被擄；他生了烏撒和亞希忽。

en: And Shaharaim fathered sons in the country of Moab after he had sent away Hushim and Baara his wives.
zh: 沙哈連遣走戶伸和巴拉兩位妻子以後，就在摩押地生了兒子。

en: He fathered sons by Hodesh his wife: Jobab, Zibia, Mesha, Malcam,
zh: 他的妻子賀得給他生了約巴、洗比雅、米沙、瑪拉干、

en: Jeuz, Sachia, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers' houses.
zh: 耶烏斯、沙迦、米瑪；他這些兒子都是家族的首領。

en: He also fathered sons by Hushim: Abitub and Elpaal.
zh: 戶伸也給他生了亞比突、以利巴力。

en: The sons of Elpaal: Eber, Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono and Lod with its towns,
zh: 以利巴力的兒子是希伯、米珊和沙麥。沙麥建造了阿挪和羅德二城，以及屬於這二城的村莊。

en: and Beriah and Shema (they were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who caused the inhabitants of Gath to flee);
zh: 還有比利亞和示瑪，他們二人是亞雅崙居民各家族的首領，曾把迦特的居民趕走。

en: and Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth.
zh: 又有亞希約、沙煞、耶利末、

en: Zebadiah, Arad, Eder,
zh: 西巴第雅、亞拉得、亞得、

en: Michael, Ishpah, and Joha were sons of Beriah.
zh: 米迦勒、伊施巴和約哈，這都是比利亞的兒子。

en: Zebadiah, Meshullam, Hizki, Heber,
zh: 西巴第雅、米書蘭、希西基、希伯、

en: Ishmerai, Izliah, and Jobab were the sons of Elpaal.
zh: 伊施米萊、伊斯利亞和約巴，這都是以利巴力的兒子。

en: Jakim, Zichri, Zabdi,
zh: 雅金、細基利、撒底、

en: Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,
zh: 以利乃、洗勒太、以列、

en: Adaiah, Beraiah, and Shimrath were the sons of Shimei.
zh: 亞大雅、比拉雅和申拉，這都是示每的兒子。

en: Ishpan, Eber, Eliel,
zh: 伊施班、希伯、以列、

en: Abdon, Zichri, Hanan,
zh: 亞伯頓、細基利、哈難、

en: Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah,
zh: 哈拿尼雅、以攔、安陀提雅、

en: Iphdeiah, and Penuel were the sons of Shashak.
zh: 伊弗底雅和毘努伊勒，這都是沙煞的兒子。

en: Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah,
zh: 珊示萊、示哈利、亞他利雅、

en: Jaareshiah, Elijah, and Zichri were the sons of Jeroham.
zh: 雅利西、以利亞和細基利，這都是耶羅罕的兒子。

en: These were the heads of fathers' houses, according to their generations, chief men. These lived in Jerusalem.
zh: 以上這些人照著家譜都是他們家族的首領，是住在耶路撒冷的首領。

en: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon, and the name of his wife was Maacah.
zh: 住在基遍的有基遍的父親耶利，他的妻子名叫瑪迦。

en: His firstborn son: Abdon, then Zur, Kish, Baal, Nadab,
zh: 他的長子是亞伯頓，其餘的兒子是蘇珥、基士、巴力、拿答、

en: Gedor, Ahio, Zecher,
zh: 基多、亞希約、撒迦和米基羅；

en: and Mikloth (he fathered Shimeah). Now these also lived opposite their kinsmen in Jerusalem, with their kinsmen.
zh: 米基羅生示米暗。這些人也和他們的親族一同住在耶路撒冷，互相為鄰。

en: Ner was the father of Kish, Kish of Saul, Saul of Jonathan, Malchi-shua, Abinadab and Eshbaal;
zh: 尼珥生基士；基士生掃羅；掃羅生約拿單、麥基舒亞、亞比拿達和伊施．巴力。

en: and the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal was the father of Micah.
zh: 約拿單的兒子是米力．巴力；米力．巴力生米迦。

en: The sons of Micah: Pithon, Melech, Tarea, and Ahaz.
zh: 米迦的兒子是毘敦、米勒、他利亞和亞哈斯。

en: Ahaz fathered Jehoaddah, and Jehoaddah fathered Alemeth, Azmaveth, and Zimri. Zimri fathered Moza.
zh: 亞哈斯生耶何阿達；耶何阿達生亞拉篾、亞斯瑪威和心利；心利生摩撒；

en: Moza fathered Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
zh: 摩撒生比尼亞；比尼亞的兒子是拉法，拉法的兒子是以利亞薩，以利亞薩的兒子是亞悉。

en: Azel had six sons, and these are their names: Azrikam, Bocheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.
zh: 亞悉有六個兒子，他們的名字是亞斯利干、波基路、以實瑪利、示亞利雅、俄巴底雅和哈難；這都是亞悉的兒子。

en: The sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
zh: 亞悉的兄弟以設的眾子是：長子烏蘭、次子耶烏施、三子以利法列。

en: The sons of Ulam were men who were mighty warriors, bowmen, having many sons and grandsons, 150. All these were Benjaminites.
zh: 烏蘭的兒子都是英勇的戰士，是弓箭手；他們有很多子孫，共有一百五十名，都是便雅憫支派的。
